problem: Why is turbulent fluid flow mathematically unpredictable — Navier-Stokes unsolved
hypothesis: Why is turbulent fluid flow mathematically unpredictable — Navier-Stokes unsolved remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Bose-Einstein. Bose-Einstein condensate at higher temperature directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
